problem id: c69805fe
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  10010011 -> 11001001
  01010110 -> 00101011
  11000111 -> 11100011
  00101000 -> 00010100
  10011111 -> 11001111
  01000011 -> 10100001
  01001000 -> 00100100
  11100011 -> 11110001
  10011110 -> 01001111
  00001110 -> 00000111

query: 10010111
predicted answer: 11001011
